fields.label: Run ID
fields.description: Server-minted idempotency key for this send; immutable; the doctype name.

fields.label: Conversation
fields.description: Owning conversation; per-conversation single-flight scopes on it.

fields.label: Relay Target ID
fields.description: Container/gateway shard; admission credits key on it. Phase 0 uses one site-wide shard.

fields.label: Turn Class
fields.description: Fairness class: interactive (typed/retry/continuation) vs background (File Box / app-learning).

fields.label: State
fields.description: Phase-0 state machine: queued -> dispatching -> done|errored|cancelled.

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Optimistic-concurrency token; bumped on every transition; the actor-fence half of every CAS.

fields.label: Seed Message
fields.description: The user message row that seeded this turn.

fields.label: Assistant Message
fields.description: The assistant row deltas stream into; null until the worker creates the placeholder.

fields.label: Reserved
fields.description: Holds one admission credit. In Phase 0 the dispatching row itself is the reservation.

fields.label: Reservation Expires At
fields.description: A dispatching turn whose enqueue was lost is returned to the queue after this instant (crashed-enqueue guard).

fields.label: Cancel Requested
fields.description: Set by stop_run on an in-flight turn; the legacy worker's aborted-terminal settles it.

fields.label: Cancel Reason
fields.description: Recorded reason when the sweep system-cancels an aged-out queued turn.

fields.label: Was Recovered
fields.description: Set when the sweep re-dispatched or reconciled this turn.

fields.label: Error
fields.description: User-facing error payload on errored terminal. Mirrors Message.error.

fields.label: Dispatch Payload
fields.description: JSON of the extra enqueue kwargs (attachments/context) so a queued turn re-dispatches with them on promotion.

fields.label: Dispatching At
fields.description: Stamped at queued->dispatching; admission-credit confirm point.

fields.label: Done At
fields.description: Stamped at the terminal transition; retention/GC timestamp.
